title: Return of the Jedi 3

'''''Return of the Jedi'' 3''' is the third issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)|Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]'' mini-series and is part of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comic books.

Part three of a four issue comic mini-series adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']].

Unlike the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel comic]] adaptations of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] & [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|The Empire Strikes Back]], this was not part of the regular series.

There are five pin-up pages in this issue, [[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout trooper]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']], Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] & a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptor]] all by [[Rick J. Bryant]].

==Publisher's summary==
''The Rebels travel to Endor to deactivate the Death Star II's deflector shield, while Luke Skywalker tells Leia Organa of her true heritage.''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|comic}}

==Continuity==
[[File:LukeRedSaber.jpg|thumb|250px|Luke Skywalker's miscolored lightsaber.]]
[[Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber/Legends|Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber]] is red and has an upside-down hilt when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] ignites it.
